purpose: Public-response-shape no-data-loss gate (CLAUDE.md ## Verification gate patterns). Future commits touching /api/recent-calls MUST diff against this snapshot before deploy. ANY new key requires a new snapshot file + matching test update; ANY removal of a key here requires consumer-audit (currently: landing/index.html#live-call-ticker — see system-map.md edge).

slug.description: Coin/asset symbol (e.g. 'BTC'). Maps to DB column `coin`.

exchange.description: Source venue. Maps to DB column `exchange`; defaults to 'HL' if null.

call.description: Composite verdict. Maps to DB column `signal`.

created_at_iso.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the trade-call emission. Maps to DB column `created_at` (unix sec int) reformatted.

seconds_ago.description: floor(server_now_unix - row.created_at). Computed at response time. Floored at 0 to defend against DB-clock-drift returning negative.

forbidden_reason: CLAUDE.md Data Integrity LAW — outcome_*/Phase-E/internal-DB/Merkle-proof fields MUST NOT leak via public endpoints. Tier is Phase-E-adjacent classification. id is internal DB PK. Verification fields belong on /api/verify-signal which is gated.

cache_contract.stale_handling: first request after TTL recomputes; concurrent miss-on-same-key may double-query (acceptable; bounded by 2s window)
